module_info.docstring:
HTTP Server and Transport Tests.

Comprehensive tests for HTTP server functionality:
1. Server starts on configured port
2. Health endpoint returns 200
3. SSE connection established
4. Tool calls work over HTTP
5. Resource reads work over HTTP
6. CORS headers present

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-9z6

classes.name: TestServerConfiguration
classes.docstring: Test that server respects configuration settings.

methods.name: test_server_builds_with_default_config
methods.docstring: Server builds successfully with default configuration.

methods.name: test_server_uses_configured_path
methods.docstring: Server mounts MCP handler at configured HTTP_PATH.

methods.name: test_server_mounts_api_and_mcp_aliases
methods.docstring: Server always exposes MCP transport on both /api and /mcp aliases.

methods.name: test_server_builds_with_custom_host_port
methods.docstring: Server configuration accepts custom host and port.

methods.name: test_liveness_returns_200
methods.docstring: Liveness endpoint returns 200 with status 'alive'.

methods.name: test_readiness_returns_200_when_healthy
methods.docstring: Readiness endpoint returns 200 when database is accessible.

methods.name: test_health_endpoints_bypass_auth
methods.docstring: Health endpoints work without authentication.

methods.name: test_sse_accept_header_supported
methods.docstring: Server accepts SSE content type in Accept header.

methods.name: test_mcp_endpoint_accepts_sse_header
methods.docstring: MCP endpoint accepts SSE content negotiation.

classes.name: TestToolCallsOverHTTP
classes.docstring: Test that MCP tool calls work over HTTP transport.

methods.name: test_health_check_tool_succeeds
methods.docstring: health_check tool call returns success over HTTP.

methods.name: test_tool_call_returns_jsonrpc_format
methods.docstring: Tool calls return proper JSON-RPC 2.0 format.

methods.name: test_tool_call_with_bearer_auth
methods.docstring: Tool calls work with bearer token authentication.

classes.name: TestResourceReadsOverHTTP
classes.docstring: Test that MCP resource reads work over HTTP transport.

methods.name: test_resources_list_returns_data
methods.docstring: resources/list returns available resources.

methods.name: test_resource_read_returns_jsonrpc
methods.docstring: Resource reads return proper JSON-RPC response.

methods.name: test_cors_preflight_returns_headers
methods.docstring: CORS preflight OPTIONS request returns appropriate headers.

methods.name: test_cors_headers_on_response
methods.docstring: CORS headers are present on regular responses.

methods.name: test_cors_disabled_no_headers
methods.docstring: When CORS is disabled, no CORS headers are added.

methods.name: test_invalid_json_returns_error
methods.docstring: Invalid JSON payload returns appropriate error.

methods.name: test_missing_method_returns_error
methods.docstring: JSON-RPC request without method returns error.

methods.name: test_request_logs_path_and_status
methods.docstring: Requests are logged with path and status.
